description: Release metadata for the TNOPSI / DSLO deterministic semantic substrate.

notes: Initial release of the deterministic semantic substrate.
Includes full header suite and minimal DSLO corpus.
Establishes invariants, constraints, semantics, and structural model.
Provides deterministic ingestion and validation pipeline.
guarantees: header remains stable for the entire 0.x series

additional_notes: This v0.1 release establishes the substrate foundation for all future DSLO and Signal Ecology work.
